zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Buckeley於1520年出生在英國哈普爾波蓋特時，她的父親William Buckeley31歲，母親Mrs Joan Buckeley13歲。她於1540年與Thomas Spencer Esq.結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1591年1月28日在英國貝德福爾貝德福德享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾可普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Buckeley于1520年出生在英国哈普爾波蓋特时，她的父亲William Buckeley31岁，母亲Mrs Joan Buckeley13岁。她于1540年与Thomas Spencer Esq.结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1591年1月28日在英国貝德福爾貝德福德享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾可普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Buckeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Buckeley was born in 1520, in Burgate, Hampshire, England, her father, William Buckeley, was 31 and her mother, Mrs Joan Buckeley, was 13. She married Thomas Spencer Esq. in 1540. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 28 January 1591, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Cople, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Buckeley est née en 1520, à Burgate, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, William Buckeley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs Joan Buckeley, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Spencer Esq. en 1540. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 janvier 1591, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Cople, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Buckeley 1520 in Burgate, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Buckeley 31 und ihre Mutter Mrs Joan Buckeley 13. Sie hat 1540 Thomas Spencer Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Januar 1591 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Cople, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Buckeley è nata il nel 1520 nel Burgate, Hampshire, England, sua padre, William Buckeley, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mrs Joan Buckeley, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Spencer Esq. nel 1540. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 gennaio 1591, nel Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Cople, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Buckeleyが1520年にイギリスハンプシュアイアブルガトで生まれた時，父William Buckeleyは31歳，母Mrs Joan Buckeleyは13歳であった。1540年にThomas Spencer Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1591年1月28日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコプルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Buckeley(이)가 1520년 영국 함프실르 버가트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Buckeley(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Joan Buckeley(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1540년 Thomas Spencer Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 1월 28일 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 코플에 묻혔다.

pt.1538: de 11 de janeiro de 1538 a 10 de janeiro de 1539
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Buckeley nasceu em 1520, em Burgate, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Buckeley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Joan Buckeley, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Spencer Esq. em 1540. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1591, em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Cople, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Buckeley родилась в 1520 г. в местности бургэит, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Buckeley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Joan Buckeley, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Spencer Esq. в 1540 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 января 1591 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности копл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
